title: EngageBay Documentation
prompt_source: Inline docs prompt; CONNECTOR_DOCUMENTATION_GUIDELINES fetched via getDocGuidelines()

sections.title: Overview
sections.content:
**EngageBay** is an all-in-one SMB CRM + marketing + sales + service + helpdesk SaaS, exposing a REST API under `https://app.engagebay.com/dev/api/panel`. This connector ‚Äî `EngageBayConnector` (`CONNECTOR_TYPE = "engagebay"`, `AUTH_TYPE = "api_key"`) ‚Äî wraps the operational surfaces a Shielva tenant typically needs from an EngageBay account:

| Surface | Base path | Capability |
|---|---|---|
| Contacts (CRM) | `/contacts`, `/contacts/{id}`, `/contacts/update-partial/{id}` | List, get, create, update, delete |
| Companies | `/companies/list/{page_size}` | List companies |
| Deals | `/deals`, `/deals/{id}` | List, create, get |
| Tasks | `/tasks`, `/tasks/{id}` | List, create, get |
| Tickets | `/tickets` | List support tickets |
| Notes | `/contacts/{id}/note` | Attach free-text notes to a contact |
| Subusers | `/subusers/list` | Lightweight auth probe (health check) |

The connector normalises contacts (and convenience deals/tasks) into `NormalizedDocument` (id = `f"{tenant_id}_{source_id}"`), surfaces standalone `async def` methods per user-requested operation (OCP), retries 429/5xx with exponential backoff + jitter (3 attempts), and never embeds raw HTTP in `connector.py` (SOC ‚Äî all HTTP delegated to `client/http_client.py::EngageBayHTTPClient`).

sections.title: Quick Start
sections.content:
### 1. Generate an EngageBay REST API key

1. Sign in to https://app.engagebay.com.
2. Open **Account ‚Üí Account Settings ‚Üí API Settings**.
3. Copy the **REST API Key** value.

### 2. Install in ACP

In **ACP ‚Üí Manage Connectors ‚Üí EngageBay**, fill in:

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| `api_key` (secret) | REST API key from step 3 |
| `base_url` (text, optional) | Override `https://app.engagebay.com/dev/api/panel` (sandbox / self-hosted) |
| `rate_limit_per_min` (number) | Soft cap, default 60 |

Click **Install**. `install()` probes `GET /subusers/list` to validate the key, persists the config, and returns `ConnectorStatus(HEALTHY, CONNECTED)`.

### 3. First health check

The gateway calls `health_check()` which lists subusers as a lightweight probe. On 2xx ‚Üí `HEALTHY + CONNECTED`. On 401 ‚Üí `OFFLINE + TOKEN_EXPIRED`. On 403 ‚Üí `UNHEALTHY + INVALID_CREDENTIALS`. On 429 ‚Üí `DEGRADED + CONNECTED` with structured-log warning.

sections.title: Authentication
sections.content:
EngageBay REST API uses **server-to-server API key authentication** (`AUTH_TYPE = "api_key"`). No OAuth dance, no token refresh, no expiry.

### Credential model

- `api_key` is sent in the `Authorization` header as the **raw key** ‚Äî **no `Bearer` prefix** (EngageBay-specific gotcha that matches the documented REST contract).

### Lifecycle

| Phase | Behaviour |
|---|---|
| `install()` | Validates `api_key` is non-empty; probes `GET /subusers/list`. Returns `ConnectorStatus(HEALTHY, CONNECTED)` on success. |
| `authorize(auth_code, state)` | Returns the stored key wrapped in a `TokenInfo` ‚Äî there is no token exchange. |
| `health_check()` | `GET /subusers/list` ‚Äî minimal probe. |
| `ensure_token()` | Not called ‚Äî no token to refresh. |
| token storage | The api_key is stored as a `TokenInfo` for surface compatibility, never refreshed. |

### Header contract

Every outbound request:

```
Authorization: <api_key>           ‚Üê raw, no Bearer prefix
Content-Type:   application/json
Accept:         application/json
```

sections.title: Configuration
sections.content:
### Install fields (per-tenant)

Read via `self.config.get(...)` in `connector.py::__init__` ‚Äî never hardcoded.

| Key | Type | Required | Read in code | Purpose |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `api_key` | secret | yes | `self.api_key` | Authorization header value (raw, no Bearer) |
| `base_url` | text | no | `self.base_url` (defaults to `https://app.engagebay.com/dev/api/panel`) | Override for sandbox / self-hosted |
| `rate_limit_per_min` | number | no | `self.rate_limit_per_min` (default 60) | Soft client-side cap |

### Class constants (provider-wide)

```python
REQUIRED_CONFIG_KEYS = ["api_key"]
_STATUS_MAP = {
    401: ("OFFLINE",   "TOKEN_EXPIRED"),
    403: ("UNHEALTHY", "INVALID_CREDENTIALS"),
    429: ("DEGRADED",  "CONNECTED"),
}
_ENGAGEBAY_BASE_URL = "https://app.engagebay.com/dev/api/panel"
```

sections.title: API Methods
sections.content: All public async methods on `EngageBayConnector`. SOC: `connector.py` orchestrates only; HTTP lives in `client/http_client.py::EngageBayHTTPClient`.

children.title: Lifecycle
children.content:
### `async install() -> ConnectorStatus`
Validate `api_key`; probe `GET /subusers/list`.

### `async authorize(auth_code, state) -> TokenInfo`
No-op for api_key auth ‚Äî returns a TokenInfo over the stored api_key.

### `async health_check() -> ConnectorStatus`
Probes `GET /subusers/list`. Classifies failures by `_STATUS_MAP`.

### `async sync(since=None, full=False, kb_id=None, webhook_url=None) -> SyncResult`
Walks `/contacts` cursor pages ‚Üí `NormalizedDocument` ‚Üí `ingest_document`. Returns `SyncResult` with `documents_synced / _failed / _found`.

children.title: Contacts
children.content:
### `async list_contacts(page_size=50, page_cursor=None) -> Dict`
`GET /contacts?page_size={N}&page_cursor={C}`. Cursor pagination.

### `async get_contact(contact_id) -> Dict`
`GET /contacts/{id}` ‚Üí flat dict with email, first_name, last_name, phone, company, tags, properties.

### `async create_contact(properties) -> Dict`
`POST /contacts` ‚Äî body `{properties: [{name, value, field_type}, ‚Ä¶]}`. `field_type` defaults to `TEXT`.

### `async update_contact(contact_id, properties) -> Dict`
`PUT /contacts/update-partial/{id}` ‚Äî partial update via properties list.

### `async delete_contact(contact_id) -> Dict`
`DELETE /contacts/{id}`.

### `async add_note(contact_id, note) -> Dict`
`POST /contacts/{id}/note` ‚Äî attach a free-text note.

children.title: Companies
children.content:
### `async list_companies(page_size=50) -> Dict`
`GET /companies/list/{page_size}`. Note the page size is path-segment, not query string.

children.title: Deals
children.content:
### `async list_deals(page_size=50) -> Dict`
`GET /deals?page_size={N}`.

### `async create_deal(name, expected_value, milestone, contact_ids=None) -> Dict`
`POST /deals` ‚Äî body `{name, expected_value, milestone, contact_ids}`.

### `async get_deal_normalized(deal_id) -> Dict`
`GET /deals/{id}` ‚Üí flat dict view.

children.title: Tasks
children.content:
### `async list_tasks(page_size=50) -> Dict`
`GET /tasks?page_size={N}`.

### `async create_task(name, due_date, contact_id=None, owner_id=None) -> Dict`
`POST /tasks` ‚Äî `due_date` is a Unix epoch in **milliseconds**.

### `async get_task_normalized(task_id) -> Dict`
`GET /tasks/{id}` ‚Üí flat dict view.

sections.title: Error Handling
sections.content:
Exception hierarchy in `exceptions.py`:

```
EngageBayError                         # base; carries status_code + response_body
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ EngageBayAuthError                  # 401 / 403
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ EngageBayBadRequestError            # 400
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ EngageBayNotFoundError              # 404
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ EngageBayConflictError              # 409
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ EngageBayRateLimitError             # 429 ‚Äî retry_after_s
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ EngageBayServerError                # 5xx
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ EngageBayNetworkError               # transport (DNS, timeout, reset)
```

Back-compat aliases preserved:
```
EngageBayNotFound = EngageBayNotFoundError
```

### Retry behaviour (`client/http_client.py::_request`)

| Status | Action |
|---|---|
| 400 / 401 / 403 / 404 | Raise immediately |
| 429 | Honour `Retry-After` if present; else exponential backoff with jitter (cap 8s), retry up to `_DEFAULT_MAX_RETRIES=3` |
| 5xx | Same exponential backoff, retry up to 3 |
| `httpx.ConnectError` / `httpx.ReadTimeout` / `httpx.WriteTimeout` | Backoff, retry up to 3, then raise `EngageBayNetworkError` |

### How errors surface to the gateway

`health_check()` catches exceptions and maps via `_STATUS_MAP`:

```
401 ‚Üí ConnectorStatus(OFFLINE,   TOKEN_EXPIRED)
403 ‚Üí ConnectorStatus(UNHEALTHY, INVALID_CREDENTIALS)
429 ‚Üí ConnectorStatus(DEGRADED,  CONNECTED)   ‚Äî logged as warning
other ‚Üí ConnectorStatus(DEGRADED, CONNECTED)
```

sections.title: Troubleshooting
sections.content:
| Symptom | Probable cause | Fix |
|---|---|---|
| `ConnectorStatus(OFFLINE, MISSING_CREDENTIALS)` at install | `api_key` blank | Re-enter the REST API key in ACP. |
| `ConnectorStatus(OFFLINE, INVALID_CREDENTIALS)` at install | 401 from `/subusers/list` | API key revoked or mistyped. Regenerate in EngageBay ‚Üí Account Settings ‚Üí API Settings. |
| `ConnectorStatus(UNHEALTHY, INVALID_CREDENTIALS)` at health_check | 403 ‚Äî API user lacks permission | Confirm the EngageBay user owning the key has the right roles (Contacts/Deals/Tasks read). |
| `engagebay.http.retry` warnings spike | Hitting 429 (60 req/min default) | The client retries with exponential backoff. Lower `rate_limit_per_min` or batch fewer requests. |
| `Authorization: Bearer ‚Ä¶` getting 401 | EngageBay expects RAW key, no Bearer prefix | The connector already sends the raw key ‚Äî verify no upstream proxy is rewriting the header. |
| `ImportError: cannot import name 'EngageBayNetworkError'` | Old code path | Already fixed ‚Äî `EngageBayNetworkError` is a first-class class in `exceptions.py`. |
| Sync inserts duplicate contacts | KB de-dup key mismatch | NormalizedDocument id = `{tenant_id}_{contact_id}` ‚Äî verify both values are stable. |
